mapper.delete: delete from t_shipper_principal where shipper_id = #{shipperId} and `type` = #{type}
mapper.select: SELECT sp.type,sp.shipper_id,sp.employee_id,e.actual_name employeeName FROM t_shipper_principal sp LEFT JOIN t_employee e on e.employee_id = sp.employee_id WHERE shipper_id = #{shipperId}

SELECT sp.type,sp.shipper_id,sp.employee_id,e.actual_name employeeName FROM t_shipper_principal sp LEFT JOIN t_employee e on e.employee_id = sp.employee_id WHERE shipper_id IN
#{item}

SELECT sp.type, sp.shipper_id, sp.employee_id, e.actual_name employeeName FROM t_shipper_principal sp LEFT JOIN t_employee e on e.employee_id = sp.employee_id WHERE shipper_id = #{shipperId} AND `type` = #{type}
